otomotiv.name: Automotive
otomotiv.title: Digital Transformation in Automotive
otomotiv.description: Digitalize your automotive production line with IATF 16949 compliant traceability, OEE tracking, and ERP integration.
solutions: Lot-based full traceability (raw material to shipment)
ERP & MES integration with seamless data flow

gida.name: Food & Beverage
gida.title: Production Management in Food & Beverage
gida.description: Maintain your food safety standards with BRC, IFS, and FDA compliant traceability, production optimization, and quality management.
challenges: Expiration date and lot management complexity
Cold chain and temperature monitoring requirements
solutions: Product-to-product full traceability and lot tracking
Temperature, humidity, and environmental condition monitoring
Paperless quality control with digital forms

ilac.name: Pharma & Healthcare
ilac.title: Compliant Production Management in Pharma
ilac.description: FDA 21 CFR Part 11, GMP, and GDP compliant digital production management. Validation, audit trail, and full traceability.
challenges: FDA 21 CFR Part 11 and EU GMP Annex 11 compliance
Electronic signature and audit trail requirements
solutions: Full audit trail and electronic signature support

tutun.name: Tobacco
tutun.title: TMC Compliant Solutions for Tobacco
tutun.description: Fully compliant data collection with OPC UA TMC standard, direct communication with cigarette machines, and regulatory reporting.
challenges: Data consolidation across different machine brands
Data loss on high-speed production lines
solutions: Integration with all brands: Hauni, GD, Focke
